summary: Reordered resolveRetagTagIDs to validate --remove-tag names before POSTing any --add-tag tags.
reason: Original order ran addSpecs (createMissing=true, POSTs /tags) before removeSpecs (validate-only). A --remove-tag typo after a successful --add-tag created orphan tags in Lunch Money — server-persisted but never associated with any transaction. Closes the remaining Greptile P1 thread on PR #624.
